items.reasoning: Sustain through Pounce harass and Remnant + Overload trades from two dive heroes.
Deep ward spots Slark Shadow Dance movement and Storm rotations.
Deward pull camp; Slark likes to deward to enable Dark Pact ganks.
2x branches for +2 stats; WW's base HP is dangerously low.
Positioning to stay outside Pounce 700 range. WW needs to be alive to cast spells.
Storm Remnant + Overload spam generates charges. Dark Pact also triggers charges.
+20 MS helps kite Slark's Pounce approach; cheap and efficient.
Push yourself or ally OUT of Pounce leash. Critical save tool against both divers.
Invisible save on carry during Slark + Storm dive. Magic resistance helps vs Storm.
Survives Storm Ball Lightning initiation. 2.5s invulnerability ensures Winter's Curse cast.
Arctic Burn becomes toggle -- permanent flying vision reveals Slark ganks and Storm rotations.
Cold Embrace heal amplified by 35%. 4s heal + immunity = full HP restoration.
Ethereal form dodges Slark right-clicks entirely. Slark's damage is 95% physical.
Armor + evasion buff on dive target. Reduces Slark Essence Shift damage.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Winter's Curse forces Slark and Storm to attack each other during dives -- the perfect anti-dive ultimate. Cold Embrace protects the dive target with 4s physical immunity. Force Staff breaks Pounce leash. Position behind carry and save spells for AFTER they commit to the dive.
